hero_subtitle: SFTY connects case activity, alerts, and evidence into streamlined internal reporting workflows to help compliance teams manage AML case reviews with a clear audit trail and regulatory readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Internal reporting slows across scattered cases
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to convert case activity into clear internal reports when evidence and decisions remain disconnected. This fragmentation increases manual work, weakens audit readiness, and complicates regulatory review for digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies case data, provider outputs, decision logs and evidence into one structured workflow that streamlines internal reporting and supports audit-ready compliance for VASP AML teams.
workflow_title: From case creation to internal reporting
workflow_description: SFTY connects case activity, evidence, decisions and regulatory rules to prepare structured internal reports and audit-ready compliance documentation.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented cases. One evidence-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects AML case activity into structured workflows, decisions, evidence and internal reports without replacing existing compliance providers or isolated tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled provider orchestration and audit-ready evidence to streamline internal case reporting and bank due diligence within secure enterprise environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps compliance teams connect provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and internal reports, improving operational control across KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, sanctions and regulatory rules monitoring.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support case reporting workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY turns alerts and provider checks into structured cases, linking evidence, decision logs and internal notes to support comprehensive AML reporting and triage within a single workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages, creating audit-ready records to support regulatory inspections, internal reviews and operational traceability across compliance processes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect our existing compliance stack?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, consolidating their outputs into a connected compliance control layer without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace onboarding, KYT or screening providers but connects their outputs into structured compliance workflows and audit-ready case reporting.
final_title: Turn AML case activity into internal reports
final_description: Review how SFTY connects case details, alerts and evidence into structured AML reporting workflows and audit-ready compliance records.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
